capabilities.name: Recurring/subscription invoices
capabilities.verify: subscription-billing-cron (due manual subs → invoice) + generate_subscription_invoice skill + subscriptions.next_invoice_date/billing_interval
capabilities.notes: Verify-first 2026-06-12: engine already exists for invoice-billed (manual) subscriptions — audit 'missing' was stale. Remaining: proration (P1.1), card-provider recurring is Stripe-native.

capabilities.name: Credit/debit notes
capabilities.verify: invoices.invoice_type + credited_invoice_id + create_credit_note RPC/skill (full negates remaining, partial = -amount, cumulative over-credit rejected as of the 20260704181000 fix — see notes; migrations 20260614090000 → 20260627220000 → 20260704181000) + admin UI: CreditNoteDialog (full/partial + reason) launched from InvoiceDetailSheet 'Issue Credit Note', linked credit notes listed on the originating invoice's detail view
capabilities.notes: LIVE VERIFICATION FOUND A REAL BUG 2026-07-04: the over-credit guard was PER-CALL, not cumulative — it compared a single credit against the invoice total but not against already-issued credits. On rzhj, invoice INV-2026-00014 (12500) accepted a 5000 credit and THEN a 10000 credit (each ≤ total individually) → -15000 credited against a 12500 invoice, an AR-integrity break. The 2026-06-14 scratch check only exercised a single over-total credit (which the per-call guard does catch), missing the cumulative case. Fixed: create_credit_note now sums existing credit notes and rejects when the running total would exceed the invoice total; full credit negates the REMAINING balance; a fully-credited invoice is rejected (forward-dated 20260704181000_fix-credit-note-cumulative-guard.sql, supersedes 20260614090000 + 20260627220000). What DID verify live: partial credit -5000 created correctly (CN-INV-2026-00014-1, invoice_type=credit_note, credited_invoice_id linked). Stays partial pending live re-verify of the cumulative guard after deploy (Lovable MCP down at fix time) + ledger reversal posting. UI shipped 2026-07-03 (src/components/admin/invoices/CreditNoteDialog.tsx).

capabilities.name: Partial/over/under payment handling
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): created invoice INV-2026-00013 (total 12500) via manage_invoice, then record_invoice_payment 5000 → remaining_cents=7500 paid_amount=5000; record_invoice_payment 20000 → correctly REJECTED ('Payment 20000 exceeds remaining balance 7500'); record_invoice_payment 7500 → remaining_cents=0, status='paid', paid_amount=12500. Mechanism: invoices.paid_amount_cents tracked by reconcile_invoice_payments (bank path) + record_invoice_payment RPC/skill (manual partial payments, overpay rejected, status→paid when settled) (migration 20260614100000) + admin UI: RecordPaymentDialog (prefilled outstanding balance, client-side overpay guard) launched from InvoiceDetailSheet 'Record Payment', paid/total progress shown on invoice detail
capabilities.notes: Bank-rec partial/over/under already existed; manual payment path added and now runtime-verified end-to-end (partial → overpay-reject → settle → paid). UI shipped 2026-07-03 (src/components/admin/invoices/RecordPaymentDialog.tsx).

capabilities.name: AR aging report
capabilities.verify: ar_aging_report RPC/skill (migration 20260703140000) buckets open invoices (total_cents - paid_amount_cents > 0, invoice_type='invoice', status<>cancelled) per customer into current/1-30/31-60/61-90/90+ days overdue vs due_date; admin UI: 'Aging Report' tab on /admin/invoices (src/components/admin/invoices/ArAgingReportTab.tsx) showing bucket totals + per-customer table
capabilities.notes: LIVE VERIFICATION FOUND A REAL BUG 2026-07-04: ar_aging_report failed at runtime with 'relation "per_customer" does not exist' — the totals SELECT referenced the per_customer CTE, but a WITH clause in PL/pgSQL only covers the single statement it prefixes, so the second statement was out of scope. This was latent in the migration itself (never worked on any instance). Fixed: totals now aggregate the already-computed v_customers jsonb array (source migration 20260703140000 corrected in place + forward-dated CREATE OR REPLACE in 20260704180000_fix-ar-aging-per-customer-scope.sql for live/managed instances). Stays partial pending live re-verify after the fix deploys to rzhj (Lovable MCP was down at fix time, so the DDL could not be applied live this session). A clean example of static inspection passing while runtime failed — Stage-3 rule vindicated.
